title: Earnings Preview: Aterian (ATER) Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Aterian Q3 2021 Earnings Preview. Financial Summary: Aterian posted revenues of $68.12 million for the quarter ended September 2021, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 6.06%, compared to year-ago revenues of $58.78 million. Revenue Breakdown: Q3 net revenues reached $68.1 million (+16% YoY), of which $35.4 million were supported by organic business and $30.7 million from recent M&A activity. Product Launches: Aterian made no new product launch in Q3 as the 40 new launches in 2021 were all made in H1. Net Loss: The net loss was almost $111 million versus a net loss of only about $800,000 year over year, but most of this was a $107 million loss they took from extinguishment of debt. Gross Margin: Gross margin is 50%, a full 2.4 percentage point increase year over year. Earnings Call: The Q3 2021 Results Conference Call was held November 8, 2021. Key Observation: Strong revenue growth from M&A activities was offset by significant one-time charges and lack of new product launches, raising questions about the company's organic growth trajectory.
